positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for picuris_pos
% SZS output start Proof for picuris_pos
1. mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [input(axiom)]
2. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains) [input(axiom)]
3. mine(harding_pegmatite_mine) & located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) & donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0,X1] : ((mountain_range_in(X0,texas) & mine(X1) & located_in(X1,X0) & donated(X1)) => $false) [input(axiom)]
5. ? [X0] : (mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) & visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~? [X0] : (mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) & visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ! [X0,X1] : ~(mountain_range_in(X0,texas) & mine(X1) & located_in(X1,X0) & donated(X1)) [true and false elimination 4]
8. ! [X0,X1] : (~mountain_range_in(X0,texas) | ~mine(X1) | ~located_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1)) [ennf transformation 7]
9. ! [X0] : (~mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) | ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
10. mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [cnf transformation 1]
11. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 2]
12. donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 3]
13. located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 3]
14. mine(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 3]
15. ~located_in(X1,X0) | ~mine(X1) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas) | ~donated(X1) [cnf transformation 8]
16. ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) [cnf transformation 9]
18. 1 <=> mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [avatar definition]
20. mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) <- (1) [avatar component clause 18]
22. 2 <=> mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [avatar definition]
24. mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) <- (2) [avatar component clause 22]
25. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 10,22,18]
26. ~mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [resolution 11,16]
27. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 26,24]
28. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 27]
29. ~mine(harding_pegmatite_mine) | ~mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [resolution 15,13]
30. ~mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [forward subsumption resolution 29,14]
31. ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 30,20]
32. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 31,12]
33. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 32]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 25]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 28]
s3. ~1 [sat_conversion 33]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
34. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for picuris_pos
% Termination reason: Refutation
